sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Beverly Hills, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Beverly Hills housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Beverly Hills housing market; Beverly Hills real estate market update; Beverly Hills home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Beverly Hills; Beverly Hills home selling market; Beverly Hills homes for sale inventory; Beverly Hills days on market; Beverly Hills listing price; Beverly Hills seller market; Beverly Hills housing market 2026; Beverly Hills market update sellers; Beverly Hills median home price; are home prices dropping in Beverly Hills; is now a good time to sell in Beverly Hills. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
